text.title: Weekly Architecture Review Agenda Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when weekly-arch-review-agenda-template is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Meeting becomes ops status; no decisions logged for weeks.
antipattern.reason: Agenda items 4-5 skipped; only the incident debrief runs.
antipattern.note: Fix: Force-walk all 5 items; require ≥1 decision per meeting.

antipattern.reason: Product feels the meeting is engineering-internal.
antipattern.note: Fix: Reframe items 1 and 5 around product-visible trade-offs; reschedule to a slot product can attend.
Fix: Add an ADR spawn check as the meeting's closing item.
